# Contributor License Agreement
### ClickyKeys — Individual Contributor License Agreement v1.0

Thank you for your interest in contributing to ClickyKeys (the "Project"), maintained by Reksaku ("Project Owner").

This Contributor License Agreement ("Agreement") sets out the terms under which you grant the Project Owner the rights to use your contributions. Please read it carefully before submitting any contribution.

By submitting a pull request, patch, or any other contribution to this repository, you accept and agree to the following terms for all your present and future contributions.

---

## 1. Definitions

**"You"** means the individual submitting a contribution to the Project.

**"Contribution"** means any original work of authorship — including source code, documentation, configuration files, tests, or other material — that you intentionally submit to the Project via pull request, issue, email, or any other communication channel.

**"Submit"** means any form of electronic or written communication sent to the Project Owner or the repository, including pull requests, issues, and code review comments containing code.

---

## 2. Grant of Copyright License

Subject to the terms of this Agreement, you hereby grant to the Project Owner and to recipients of software distributed by the Project Owner a **perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable copyright license** to:

- reproduce, prepare derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, and distribute your Contributions and any derivative works;
- sublicense the above rights to third parties under any license, including licenses more restrictive or more permissive than the license currently applied to the Project.

This includes the right for the Project Owner to change the Project's license in the future without requiring additional consent from you, provided that the new license does not impose obligations on you retroactively.

---

## 3. Grant of Patent License

Subject to the terms of this Agreement, you hereby grant to the Project Owner and to recipients of software distributed by the Project Owner a **perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable patent license** to make, have made, use, offer to sell, sell, import, and otherwise transfer the Project, where such license applies only to patent claims licensable by you that are necessarily infringed by your Contribution alone or in combination with the Project.

---

## 4. Your Representations

By submitting a Contribution, you represent and warrant that:

1. You are legally entitled to grant the above licenses. If your employer has rights to intellectual property you create, you have received permission to make the Contribution on behalf of your employer, or your employer has waived such rights.

2. Your Contribution is your original creation and does not, to the best of your knowledge, violate any third-party intellectual property rights.

3. Your Contribution does not include any material that is subject to separate license terms that would restrict the Project Owner's ability to use it as described in this Agreement.

4. You are at least 18 years of age, or if you are a minor, you have obtained the consent of a parent or legal guardian to enter into this Agreement.

5. You will notify the Project Owner promptly if you become aware of any facts or circumstances that would make these representations inaccurate.

---

## 5. No Obligation

You acknowledge that the Project Owner is under no obligation to:

- accept or use your Contribution;
- provide compensation of any kind for your Contribution;
- credit you in any particular way, although the Project Owner will make reasonable efforts to acknowledge contributors.

---

## 6. No Transfer of Ownership

This Agreement does not transfer ownership of your Contribution to the Project Owner. You retain full copyright over your Contribution. The licenses granted here are in addition to, not instead of, any rights you retain.

---

## 7. Disclaimer

Your Contributions are provided **"as is"**, without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.

---

## 8. Miscellaneous

- This Agreement is governed by the laws of the Republic of Poland, without regard to conflict of law provisions.
- If any provision of this Agreement is held to be unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force.
- This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between you and the Project Owner regarding your Contributions and supersedes any prior agreements on the subject.

---

## Signing

This Agreement is accepted automatically when you submit a Contribution to the ClickyKeys repository. By opening a pull request, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to the terms above.

For corporate contributors or contributions made on behalf of an employer, please contact the Project Owner directly before submitting: [clickykeys.fun](https://clickykeys.fun)
